title: AI-Powered Trading Agents with 145% Annualized Returns
author: tickeron_community
selftext: **Los Angeles, CA – September 8, 2025** – [Tickeron](https://tickeron.com/), a leader in AI-driven financial technology, today announced the launch of its advanced [AI Trading Agents](https://tickeron.com/bot-stock-trading/), delivering real-time trading signals and sophisticated money management for retail and institutional traders. Powered by Financial Learning Models (FLMs) and machine learning, these agents operate across 5-, 15-, and 60-minute timeframes, achieving annualized returns of up to 145% on select portfolios. Designed for both novice and experienced traders, Tickeron’s platform combines technical analysis with AI to provide precise, user-friendly trading solutions.
